data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the last-touch/first-touch policy fields, but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of these fields. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, such as booking activities and financial outputs, without addressing the specific requirement of last-touch/first-touch policy fields. This indicates a gap in the current implementation regarding the specific requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of last-touch/first-touch policy fields.
